notes:
### v1.2.0

#### Transition from Party Planner to MeowConnect
- Party Planner has been removed and replaced by MeowConnect.
- The old Google Sheets and Apps Script sync path is no longer part of the app.
- Existing `party_plans.json` files are now inert legacy data and are not used by MeowConnect.

#### Added
- MeowConnect adds shared raid availability through the MeowGangConnect Supabase database.
- Discord login now creates the MeowConnect identity used for secure cloud sync.
- Users can opt in to MeowConnect, choose which characters are shared, add friends, and mark favorites locally.
- Raid Together shows how many matching open runs you and each friend can still do for selected raids.
- Logs show recent clears from LOA Logs encounter data and manual completion tracking, including the clear source.
- Raid settings can mark characters as reserved for static or friend runs per raid and difficulty.
- System Settings now include MeowConnect enable/disable and real-time completion sync toggles.
- The app header now shows MeowConnect connection status.

#### Improved
- Raid availability now respects raid-wide difficulty lockouts.
- Friend search and profile display were tightened with whitelist name previews, request handling, avatars for connected users, and a cleaner settings layout.
- MeowConnect sync now runs on app start, after successful daily roster scraping, and after raid completions when real-time syncing is enabled.
- Manual MeowConnect sync is rate limited to avoid unnecessary database requests.
- Update release notes now render as formatted text instead of raw Markdown.

#### Removed
- Removed the PartyPlan component, Party Plan frontend service, Tauri Party Plan commands, Rust handler module, styles, and Apps Script development template.

#### Security
- MeowConnect database access is protected with Supabase row-level security.
- Users can write only their own shared data and read only their own or accepted friends' shared data.

#### Fixed
- Favorites now apply per character instead of marking every character from the same profile.
- Old Party Planner tab URLs and disabled MeowConnect URLs now redirect back to Dashboard instead of showing an empty view.

## Installation
Download `loatracker_1.2.0_x64-setup.exe` below.
